sub_groupings.name: Conductive Hearing Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions affecting sound transmission through the outer or middle ear

sub_groupings.name: Sensorineural Hearing Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Inner ear or auditory nerve dysfunction causing hearing impairment

sub_groupings.name: Ear Infections & Inflammatory Conditions
sub_groupings.description: Infectious or inflammatory processes affecting ear structures

sub_groupings.name: Congenital Ear Anomalies
sub_groupings.description: Developmental abnormalities present at birth affecting ear structures

sub_groupings.name: Traumatic Ear Conditions
sub_groupings.description: Physical injuries or damage to ear structures

sub_groupings.name: Neurological Ear Syndromes
sub_groupings.description: Neurological conditions with associated hearing manifestations

sub_groupings.name: Ear Structural Abnormalities
sub_groupings.description: Physical deformities or malformations of ear anatomy

sub_groupings.name: Ear Fluid & Pressure Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions related to fluid dynamics or pressure changes in ear

sub_groupings.name: Other Ear & Hearing Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Miscellaneous ear conditions not fitting above categories
